name: Mynet Inc.
summary: Mynet Inc. provides game services in Japan. The company engages in redesigning of game, developing new functions, creating attractive characters, and improving the communication experience. It also operates CroPro, a mutual customer network for smartphone games; owns a range of high-quality assets; and provides data / AI solutions, such as Optim Robo, a marketing AI service that promotes customer acquisition and royal customerization for long-term service operation. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
